prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration arranged as two horizontal stacked panels separated by a thin white divider, showing the same Riona, a blonde schoolgirl in a bright classroom on a sunny day. There are exactly 2 panels: the top panel is a high-angle view from above her right side as she sits on a wooden classroom chair beside a large sunlit window, holding a pale blue popsicle near her mouth; the bottom panel is a closer chest-up portrait from the front with the same popsicle held in one hand, classroom desks and a chalkboard softly blurred behind her, and a vivid blue sky with white clouds visible through the window. She has short, slightly messy wet-looking golden blonde bob hair catching warm sunlight, a fair complexion, and wears a damp-looking white gym shirt with navy collar and sleeve trim plus navy athletic shorts. Add exactly 2 star accessories: one blue-and-gold star necklace pendant and one matching dangling star earring. The scene should feel summery and nostalgic, with warm afternoon light, glossy highlights, parquet classroom floor, wooden desks, a chalkboard in the background, and soft depth of field. Place flat opaque tan censor rectangles over the face area in both panels, matching the skin-tone block style visible in the image, while keeping the hair, ear, jewelry, outfit, hand, popsicle, classroom, and window lighting visible. Use detailed semi-realistic anime rendering, soft painterly shading, high-resolution vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio, and a bright clean color palette centered on white, navy blue, gold, and sky blue.
